title: ESTACADA AREA FOOD BANK - 211info
text: ESTACADA AREA FOOD BANK ESTACADA AREA FOOD BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Shopping-style food pantry providing a 5-day supply of food to households. Also provides pet food, hygiene items, household supplies, and clothing as available. Accepts food and pet food donations. 272 S Broadway Street Estacada, OR 97023 Eligibility: USDA-TEFAP income guidelines. SNAP, TANF, SSI, LIHEAP recipients automatically eligible. Hours: Pantry: 2nd and 4th Tuesdays of the month 10am-2pm, Wednesday 2pm-6pm, Thursday 10am-2pm Donations: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm, Wednesday 2pm-6pm Email (503) 630-2888 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 630-2888 Main phone Main phone (503) 630-2888 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information. Donation needs list on website. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Cities of Barton, Carver, Colton, Damascus, Eagle Creek, and Estacada TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located downtown, across from the Hi School Pharmacy Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Food Pantries Pet Food If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
